name: Kal Jerico

One canonical row per cross-batch decision — soft-reboot stylistic continuity, not a re-cast

name: Wotan

name: Scabbs
notes: Kal Jerico's ratskin sidekick; classic Kal-Jerico-trilogy

name: Lord Gerontius Helmawr
notes: Classic-imprint Spire-Lord of Hive Primus; assassinated in Lasgun Wedding (W40K-0170). Distinct row from the modern-imprint lord_helmawr per the soft-reboot in-fiction-continuity break (Loop-Log: 'Lord Helmawr is alive again' in Soulless Fury)

name: Lord Helmawr
notes: Modern-imprint Spire-Lord of Hive Primus in Soulless Fury (W40K-0177); soft-reboot revival of the throne after the classic Lord Gerontius Helmawr's assassination. Distinct row from gerontius_helmawr

name: Cardinal Crimson

name: Mad Donna

Cross-batch alias-consolidation: surface form 'D'onne Ulanti' (her House Ulanti birth-name) aliased to this row. primaryFactionId reflects current allegiance per mabbon_etogaur precedent (origin: House Ulanti)

name: Iktomi

notes: Resolver-Pass 7: Carcharodons Captain / POV of Robbie MacNiven's Red Tithe + Outer Dark (W40K-0442/0443), freq 2.

name: Jain Zar

name: Lemartes

notes: Resolver-Pass 7: Imperial Knight noble of the Chimaeros confederacy in Clark's Knightsblade (W40K-0446), freq 1. Phase-1 FK target (anticipated companion to luk_kar_chimaeros); primaryFactionId house_chimaeros landed by Pass-7 Phase 1.

name: Zelia Lor
notes: Resolver-Pass 8 Phase 3: civilian xenoarchaeologist's daughter and POV of Cavan Scott's Warped Galaxies kids' series (W40K-0486..0490) + sequel-opener Tomb of the Necron (W40K-0491). Dossier 7a Case A: combined freq 6 (Zelia Lor freq 5 + bare-given-name 'Zelia' freq 1). One row + alias 'Zelia' → zelia_lor (character-aliases.json). primaryFactionId imperium per dossier 7d Note 1 (civilian fallback to broad row).

name: Talen
notes: Resolver-Pass 8 Phase 3: Imperial Guardsman boy companion in Cavan Scott's Warped Galaxies kids' series (W40K-0486..0490) + Tomb of the Necron (W40K-0491). freq 6 (top character of the wave). primaryFactionId astra_militarum (Cadian-boy framing per dossier 7b).

name: Mekki
notes: Resolver-Pass 8 Phase 3: Forge-World tech-priest novice companion in Cavan Scott's Warped Galaxies kids' series (W40K-0486..0490). freq 5 across all five batch-049 Warped Galaxies novels. primaryFactionId mechanicus per dossier 7b.

name: Fleapit
notes: Resolver-Pass 8 Phase 3: abhuman/robot companion in Cavan Scott's Warped Galaxies kids' series (W40K-0486..0490). freq 5. primaryFactionId null per dossier 7d Note 1 (no clean canonical faction; abhumans row does not exist, broader 'imperium' would mis-represent affiliation — Torris-Vaun precedent for unmodeled affiliation).

name: Minka Lesk
notes: Resolver-Pass 8 Phase 3: Cadian POV of Justin D. Hill's Cadian Saga (W40K-0469 Cadia Stands, W40K-0470 Cadian Honour, W40K-0471 Traitor Rock, W40K-0472 Shadow of the Eighth, W40K-0473 Last Whiteshield collection). freq 5 — single most recurrent unresolved Phase-3 row in this wave (dossier 7b). primaryFactionId astra_militarum (Cadian Shock Troops regiment grain handled at faction-axis via Phase-1 alias).

name: Erasmus Crowl
notes: Resolver-Pass 8 Phase 3: Imperial Inquisitor POV of Chris Wraight's Vaults of Terra trilogy (W40K-0456 The Carrion Throne, W40K-0457 The Hollow Mountain, W40K-0458 The Dark City) + the omnibus W40K-0459. freq 4 across trilogy + omnibus. primaryFactionId inquisition per dossier 7b.

name: Luce Spinoza
notes: Resolver-Pass 8 Phase 3: Crowl's interrogator-acolyte in Chris Wraight's Vaults of Terra trilogy (W40K-0456..0458) + omnibus W40K-0459. freq 4. primaryFactionId inquisition (Inquisitorial Interrogator grain shares the Ordo umbrella).

name: Grekh
notes: Resolver-Pass 8 Phase 3: Kroot tracker / mercenary in Darius Hinks' Blackstone Fortress duology + Vaults of Obsidian anthology (W40K-0483/0484/0485). freq 3. primaryFactionId kroot — first character to bind the Phase-1 promotion (kroot row landed by Phase 1, parent tau), runbook §5 FK chain green.

name: Inquisitor Covenant
notes: Resolver-Pass 8 Phase 3: Inquisitor protagonist of John French's Horusian Wars trilogy (W40K-0466 Resurrection, W40K-0467 Incarnation, W40K-0468 Divination). freq 3 (one per volume). primaryFactionId inquisition per dossier 7b.

name: Janus Draik
notes: Resolver-Pass 8 Phase 3: Rogue Trader POV of Darius Hinks' Blackstone Fortress duology + Vaults of Obsidian anthology (W40K-0483/0484/0485). freq 3. primaryFactionId rogue_traders per dossier 7b.

name: Mortarion
notes: Resolver-Pass 8 Phase 3: Daemon Primarch of the Death Guard, central antagonist of Guy Haley's Dark Imperium trilogy (W40K-0463 Dark Imperium, W40K-0464 Plague War, W40K-0465 Godblight). freq 3 — both lore-iconic primarch and freq≥2 evidence. primaryFactionId death_guard.

name: Raus
notes: Resolver-Pass 8 Phase 3: Ratling twin (with rein) in Darius Hinks' Blackstone Fortress duology + Vaults of Obsidian anthology (W40K-0483/0484/0485). freq 3. primaryFactionId ratlings — binds the Phase-1 abhuman-auxiliary promotion (ratlings row landed by Phase 1, parent astra_militarum).

name: Rein
notes: Resolver-Pass 8 Phase 3: Ratling twin (with raus) in Darius Hinks' Blackstone Fortress duology + Vaults of Obsidian anthology (W40K-0483/0484/0485). freq 3. primaryFactionId ratlings (Phase-1 abhuman-auxiliary row).

name: Aleksei Lev Tieron
notes: Resolver-Pass 8 Phase 3: Chancellor of the Senatorum Imperialis (High Twelve official) in Chris Wraight's Watchers of the Throne duology (W40K-0452 The Emperor's Legion, W40K-0453 The Regent's Shadow). freq 2. primaryFactionId senatorum_imperialis (Pass-7 promotion).

name: Audus
notes: Resolver-Pass 8 Phase 3: Draik's retainer / crew (pilot) in Darius Hinks' Blackstone Fortress duology (W40K-0483, W40K-0485). freq 2. primaryFactionId rogue_traders (Rogue-Trader-retinue grain matches Draik).

name: Harleen Amity
notes: Resolver-Pass 8 Phase 3: Inquisitor introduced in Cavan Scott's Warped Galaxies cluster — Secrets of the Tau (W40K-0488) + War of the Orks (W40K-0489). freq 2. primaryFactionId inquisition per dossier 7b.

name: Isola
notes: Resolver-Pass 8 Phase 3: Draik's retainer (factotum/seneschal) in Darius Hinks' Blackstone Fortress duology (W40K-0483, W40K-0485). freq 2. primaryFactionId rogue_traders (Rogue-Trader-retinue grain).

name: Taddeus
notes: Resolver-Pass 8 Phase 3: Ecclesiarchy preacher attached to Draik's expedition in Darius Hinks' Blackstone Fortress duology (W40K-0483, W40K-0485). freq 2. primaryFactionId ecclesiarchy per dossier 7b.

name: Tanau Aleya
notes: Resolver-Pass 8 Phase 3: Sister of Silence Vigilator paired with Valerian across Chris Wraight's Watchers of the Throne duology (W40K-0452, W40K-0453). freq 2. primaryFactionId talons_of_the_emperor (Sisters-of-Silence axis already aliased).

name: Valerian
notes: Resolver-Pass 8 Phase 3: Custodian Companion paired with Tanau Aleya across Chris Wraight's Watchers of the Throne duology (W40K-0452, W40K-0453). freq 2. primaryFactionId custodes.

name: Vorne
notes: Resolver-Pass 8 Phase 3: Draik retainer (gun-servant / heavy weapons) in Darius Hinks' Blackstone Fortress duology (W40K-0483, W40K-0485). freq 2. primaryFactionId rogue_traders (Rogue-Trader-retinue grain).

name: Yvraine
notes: Resolver-Pass 8 Phase 3: Emissary of Ynnead / Daughter of Shades, prophetess of the Ynnari. Cameos across Gav Thorpe's Iyanden duology (W40K-0481 Ghost Warrior, W40K-0482 Wild Rider). freq 2 — lore-iconic Ynnari leader (dossier 7b).

name: Gabriel Seth
notes: Resolver-Pass 8 Phase 3: Chapter Master of the Flesh Tearers, lore-iconic Blood-Angels-successor figure. Appears in Guy Haley's Devastation of Baal (W40K-0474). freq 1 lore-iconic per dossier 7b cluster.

name: Kardan Stronos
notes: Resolver-Pass 8 Phase 3: Iron Council Chapter Master of the Iron Hands, lore-iconic anchor of David Guymer's Iron Hands cluster (W40K-0460 Eye of Medusa, W40K-0461 Voice of Mars, W40K-0462 Meduson Wings). freq 1 strict; lore-iconic per dossier 7b (Eye of Medusa / Voice of Mars are his story).

name: The Visarch
notes: Resolver-Pass 8 Phase 3: Sword of Ynnead, Yvraine's bodyguard. Cameo in Gav Thorpe's Ghost Warrior (W40K-0481). freq 1 lore-iconic per dossier 7b/7c — part of the Ynnari triumvirate (Yvraine / Visarch / Yncarne).

name: The Yncarne
notes: Resolver-Pass 8 Phase 3: Avatar of Ynnead, manifested via Yvraine's rituals. Cameo in Gav Thorpe's Ghost Warrior (W40K-0481). freq 1 lore-iconic per dossier 7b/7c (Ynnari triumvirate).

name: Iyanna Arienal
notes: Resolver-Pass 8 Phase 3: Iyanden Spiritseer aligned with the Ynnari, central figure of Gav Thorpe's Ghost Warrior (W40K-0481). freq 1 lore-iconic per dossier 7c (Ynnari & Iyanden lore-iconic). primaryFactionId ynnari (post-Yvraine alignment context).

name: Typhus
notes: Resolver-Pass 8 Phase 3: Herald of Nurgle, host of the Destroyer Hive, lord of the Death Guard. Appears in Guy Haley's Plague War (W40K-0464). freq 1 lore-iconic per dossier 7c (Plague Lord of the Death Guard, primarch-tier antagonist).

name: Agusto Zidarov
notes: Resolver-Pass 9 Phase 3 (7a Case A): Varangantua Probator (Warhammer Crime), POV of Chris Wraight's Bloodlines (W40K-0540) and recurring in the Broken City anthology (W40K-0543). freq 2 strict (combined across two books); the Probator-rank prefix is consolidated via alias 'Probator Agusto Zidarov'. primaryFactionId adeptus_arbites per dossier 7a (Probators surface as both Arbites rank and Enforcer role across these books — Pass-9 Phase-1 alias Enforcers→adeptus_arbites confirms the Browse-Root).

name: Djoseras
notes: Resolver-Pass 9 Phase 3 (7b spine): Necron, Oltyx's brother in Nate Crowley's Twice-Dead King trilogy + omnibus (W40K-0551 Ruin, W40K-0552 Reign, W40K-0553 omnibus). freq 3 strict — anchored across the trilogy and the 2025 omnibus reissue.

name: Oltyx
notes: Resolver-Pass 9 Phase 3 (7b spine): Necron Nemesor protagonist of Nate Crowley's Twice-Dead King trilogy + omnibus (W40K-0551, W40K-0552, W40K-0553). freq 3 strict — POV across the entire trilogy.

name: Yenekh
notes: Resolver-Pass 9 Phase 3 (7b spine): Necron Cryptek, Oltyx's vizier in Nate Crowley's Twice-Dead King trilogy + omnibus (W40K-0551, W40K-0552, W40K-0553). freq 3 strict.

name: Priad
notes: Resolver-Pass 9 Phase 3 (7b spine): Iron Snakes Astartes (Damocles-Squad sergeant), POV across Matthew Farrer's Urdesh duology (W40K-0549, W40K-0550). freq 2 strict; primaryFactionId iron_snakes (Chapter-level grain).

name: Baggit
notes: Resolver-Pass 9 Phase 3 (7b spine): Ratling POV of Alec Worley's Baggit-and-Clodde duology (W40K-0547 Dredge Runners, W40K-0548 The Wraithbone Phoenix). freq 2 strict; primaryFactionId ratlings (Pass-8 promoted row — abhuman auxiliary grain).

name: Clodde
notes: Resolver-Pass 9 Phase 3 (7b spine): Ogryn POV of Alec Worley's Baggit-and-Clodde duology (W40K-0547 Dredge Runners, W40K-0548 The Wraithbone Phoenix). freq 2 strict; primaryFactionId ogryns — uses the Phase-1 new row (grain parity with Baggit/ratlings inside the same duology, dossier 7b/7c).

name: Tabidiah Kruger
notes: Resolver-Pass 9 Phase 3 (7b spine): Imperial handler / fixer paired with Baggit and Clodde across Alec Worley's duology (W40K-0547, W40K-0548). freq 2 strict; primaryFactionId astra_militarum as Imperial-line fallback (Kruger is a civilian-edge fixer with no clean sub-faction — broader Imperial-Guard umbrella per dossier 7b).

name: Inquisitor Rostov
notes: Resolver-Pass 9 Phase 3 (7b spine): John French's Ordo Hereticus Inquisitor across the Dawn of Fire spine (W40K-0531 Throne of Light, W40K-0535 Hand of Abaddon). freq 2 strict; primaryFactionId inquisition (parent grain).

name: Ferren Areios
notes: Resolver-Pass 9 Phase 3 (7b spine): Salamanders Captain across Nick Kyme's Dawn of Fire entries (W40K-0535 Hand of Abaddon, W40K-0538 Master of Rites — the Areios spin-off). freq 2 strict; primaryFactionId salamanders.

name: Solomon Akurra
notes: Resolver-Pass 9 Phase 3 (7b spine): Alpha Legion Harrowmaster, POV across Mike Brooks' Renegades duology (W40K-0560 Renegades: Harrowmaster, W40K-0561 Ghost Legion). freq 2 strict; primaryFactionId alpha_legion (direct § 3).

name: Szarekh
notes: Resolver-Pass 9 Phase 3 (7c lore-iconic freq=1): The Silent King of the Necrons, primarch-tier Necron figure; antagonist of Guy Haley's The Silent King (W40K-0536, Dawn of Fire finale).

name: Nemesor Zahndrekh
notes: Resolver-Pass 9 Phase 3 (7c lore-iconic freq=1): Sautekh Nemesor, eccentric Necron Lord still fighting his Imperial-era war; POV of Nate Crowley's Severed (W40K-0564). primaryFactionId sautekh_dynasty — uses the Phase-1 new finer-grain row (broader-grain fallback would be necrons).

name: Vargard Obyron
notes: Resolver-Pass 9 Phase 3 (7c lore-iconic freq=1): Zahndrekh's loyal Vargard (bodyguard); Severed (W40K-0564). primaryFactionId sautekh_dynasty (Phase-1 finer-grain row; pair with nemesor_zahndrekh).

name: Trajann Valoris
notes: Resolver-Pass 9 Phase 3 (7c lore-iconic freq=1): Captain-General of the Adeptus Custodes; Nick Kyme's Auric Gods (W40K-0563).

name: Kor Phaeron
notes: Resolver-Pass 9 Phase 3 (7c lore-iconic freq=1): Word Bearers Master of the Faith, Erebus's peer, Heresy-era Chaos lord; Guy Haley's Throne of Light (W40K-0531, Dawn of Fire #4).

name: Makari
notes: Resolver-Pass 9 Phase 3 (7c lore-iconic freq=1): Ghazghkull's grot banner-bearer (Da Lucky 'Un); Nate Crowley's Ghazghkull Thraka: Prophet of the Waaagh! (W40K-0558).

name: Falx
notes: Resolver-Pass 9 Phase 3 (7c lore-iconic freq=1): Ordo Xenos Inquisitor in Nate Crowley's Ghazghkull Thraka: Prophet of the Waaagh! (W40K-0558). primaryFactionId ordo_xenos (direct § 3) per loop-log batch 056 primary-tagging.

name: Iron Queen Orlah
notes: Resolver-Pass 9 Phase 3 (7c lore-iconic freq=1): Imperial Knight Queen of House Kamidar; Nick Kyme's The Iron Kingdom (W40K-0532, Dawn of Fire #5). primaryFactionId imperial_knights (direct § 3).

name: Horus
notes: Resolver-Pass 10 Phase 3 (7b spine, freq 3): Warmaster Horus, Primarch of the Sons of Horus / Luna Wolves; central protagonist of the opening Heresy arc (Horus Rising HH-0001, False Gods HH-0002, Galaxy in Flames HH-0003). primaryFactionId sons_of_horus (anchor exists in baseline; Luna Wolves surface-form aliases onto it via faction-aliases per Phase 1 Case A).

name: Lion El'Jonson
notes: Resolver-Pass 10 Phase 3 (7b Primarch spine, freq 4): Primarch of the Dark Angels; surfaces across Descent of Angels (HH-0006), Fallen Angels (HH-0011), Age of Darkness (HH-0016). Apostrophe stripped in slug per convention (cf. shaso_oreskaan / aunrai).

name: Leman Russ
notes: Resolver-Pass 10 Phase 3 (7b Primarch spine, freq 3): Primarch of the Space Wolves; surfaces in Tales of Heresy (HH-0010), A Thousand Sons (HH-0012), Prospero Burns (HH-0015 — POV of the Burning of Prospero).

name: Lorgar
notes: Resolver-Pass 10 Phase 3 (7b Primarch spine, freq 3): Primarch of the Word Bearers; first traitor Primarch. Surfaces in Tales of Heresy (HH-0010), The First Heretic (HH-0014, POV), Know No Fear (HH-0019, Calth).

name: Fulgrim
notes: Resolver-Pass 10 Phase 3 (7b Primarch spine, freq 3): Primarch of the Emperor's Children; fall-to-Slaanesh arc. Surfaces in Galaxy in Flames (HH-0003), Fulgrim (HH-0005, eponymous), The Primarchs (HH-0020).

name: Alpharius
notes: Resolver-Pass 10 Phase 3 (7b Primarch spine, freq 3): Primarch of the Alpha Legion (twin to Omegon — Cabal-arc twist); Legion (HH-0007), Deliverance Lost (HH-0018), The Primarchs (HH-0020). Two-Primarch Legion convention does not split the legion row.

name: Omegon
notes: Resolver-Pass 10 Phase 3 (7b Primarch spine, freq 3): Twin Primarch of the Alpha Legion (paired with Alpharius); Legion (HH-0007), Deliverance Lost (HH-0018), The Primarchs (HH-0020). Same primaryFactionId as alpharius — Legion-twin convention.

name: Angron
notes: Resolver-Pass 10 Phase 3 (7b Primarch spine, freq 2): Primarch of the World Eaters (Butcher's Nails); surfaces in Galaxy in Flames (HH-0003), Tales of Heresy (HH-0010).

name: Rogal Dorn
notes: Resolver-Pass 10 Phase 3 (7b Primarch spine, curated freq=1 lore-iconic): Primarch of the Imperial Fists, Praetorian of Terra; The Flight of the Eisenstein (HH-0004). primaryFactionId imperial_fists (direct § 3 baseline).

name: Corax
notes: Resolver-Pass 10 Phase 3 (7b Primarch spine, curated freq=1 lore-iconic): Primarch of the Raven Guard; Deliverance Lost (HH-0018). Post-Isstvan-V Drop Site Massacre survivor.

name: Konrad Curze
notes: Resolver-Pass 10 Phase 3 (7b Primarch spine, curated freq=1 lore-iconic): Primarch of the Night Lords (Night Haunter); Age of Darkness (HH-0016).

name: Garviel Loken
notes: Resolver-Pass 10 Phase 3 (7b spine, freq 3): Sons of Horus / Luna Wolves Mournival captain; central POV of the opening trilogy (Horus Rising HH-0001, False Gods HH-0002, Galaxy in Flames HH-0003).

name: Tarik Torgaddon
notes: Resolver-Pass 10 Phase 3 (7b spine, freq 3): Sons of Horus / Luna Wolves Mournival captain; opening trilogy (HH-0001..HH-0003).

name: Horus Aximand
notes: Resolver-Pass 10 Phase 3 (7b spine, freq 2 + freq 1 alias): Sons of Horus Mournival captain ('Little Horus' nickname); opening trilogy (HH-0001, HH-0002) + Age of Darkness (HH-0016 as 'Little Horus Aximand'). Surface form 'Little Horus Aximand' aliases here via character-aliases.json (7d cross-batch consolidation).

name: Erebus
notes: Resolver-Pass 10 Phase 3 (7b spine, freq 4 — highest-freq new HH character): Word Bearers First Chaplain, Heresy puppet-master. Surfaces in False Gods (HH-0002), Galaxy in Flames (HH-0003), The First Heretic (HH-0014, prime mover).

name: Nathaniel Garro
notes: Resolver-Pass 10 Phase 3 (7b spine, freq 2): Death Guard battle-captain, loyalist who escapes the Eisenstein; Galaxy in Flames (HH-0003), The Flight of the Eisenstein (HH-0004, POV). Later founds the Knights-Errant frame. primaryFactionId death_guard (nominally Death Guard in this wave even though loyalist).

name: Malcador the Sigillite
notes: Resolver-Pass 10 Phase 3 (7b spine, freq 2): Imperial Regent and first Sigillite; Nemesis (HH-0013), Deliverance Lost (HH-0018). primaryFactionId imperium — no clean Legion affiliation; broad-grain Imperium row is the right anchor.

name: Luther
notes: Resolver-Pass 10 Phase 3 (7b spine, freq 2): Caliban-side Order knight, Lion El'Jonson's mentor; pivot character of the Fallen arc. Descent of Angels (HH-0006), Fallen Angels (HH-0011). primaryFactionId order_of_caliban (Phase 1 promoted; the Order eventually merges into the Dark Angels).

name: Nemiel
notes: Resolver-Pass 10 Phase 3 (7b spine, freq 2): Dark Angels chaplain; Descent of Angels (HH-0006), Fallen Angels (HH-0011).

name: Zahariel
notes: Resolver-Pass 10 Phase 3 (7b spine, freq 2): Dark Angels librarian; same arc as Nemiel — Descent of Angels (HH-0006), Fallen Angels (HH-0011).

name: Constantin Valdor
notes: Resolver-Pass 10 Phase 3 (7b curated freq=1 lore-iconic): Captain-General of the Custodes during the Heresy; Tales of Heresy (HH-0010).

name: Saul Tarvitz
notes: Resolver-Pass 10 Phase 3 (7b curated freq=1 lore-iconic): Emperor's Children loyalist; lone-voice warning of Isstvan III virus-bombing. Galaxy in Flames (HH-0003).

name: Argel Tal
notes: Resolver-Pass 10 Phase 3 (7b curated freq=1 lore-iconic): Word Bearers / Gal Vorbak; central POV of The First Heretic (HH-0014).

name: Iacton Qruze
notes: Resolver-Pass 10 Phase 3 (7b curated freq=1 lore-iconic): Sons of Horus / Luna Wolves elder ('Half-heard'); later Knight-Errant. Age of Darkness (HH-0016).

name: Kasper Hawser
